info.title: API.Bible
info.description: API.Bible by American Bible Society. Access nearly 1500 Bible versions across 1000+ languages. Search, browse books, chapters, verses, passages, and sections. Also supports audio Bibles.

tags.name: Passages
tags.description: Fetch a Passage for a Bible

tags.name: Audio Books
tags.description: Fetch Books for a Audio Bible

tags.name: Audio Chapters
tags.description: Fetch Chapters for a Audio Bible

get.description: Gets an array of `Bible` objects authorized for current API Key

400.description: Not authorized to retrieve any Bibles or invalid language_code provided

401.description: Unauthorized for API access.  Missing or Invalid API Key provided.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: ISO 639-3 three digit language code used to filter results

parameters.name: abbreviation
parameters.description: Bible abbreviation to search for

parameters.description: Bible name to search for

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Comma separated list of Bible Ids to return

parameters.name: include-full-details
parameters.description: Boolean to include full Bible details (e.g. copyright and promo info)

get.summary:
Gets a single `Chapter` object for a given `bibleId` and `chapterId`.
This Chapt
get.description:
Gets a single `Chapter` object for a given `bibleId` and `chapterId`.
This Chapter object also includes an `content` property with all verses for the Chapter.

401.description: Unauthorized for API access.  Missing or Invalid API Token provided.

parameters.description: Id of Bible whose Chapter to fetch

parameters.name: chapterId
parameters.description: Id of the Chapter to fetch

parameters.name: content-type
parameters.description: Content type to be returned in the content property.  Supported values are `html` (default), `json` (beta), and `text` (beta)

parameters.name: include-notes
parameters.description: Include footnotes in content

parameters.name: include-titles
parameters.description: Include section titles in content

parameters.name: include-chapter-numbers
parameters.description: Include chapter numbers in content

parameters.name: include-verse-numbers
parameters.description: Include verse numbers in content.

parameters.name: include-verse-spans
parameters.description: Include spans that wrap verse numbers and verse text for bible content.

parameters.name: parallels
parameters.description: Comma delimited list of bibleIds to include

get.summary:
Gets a `Passage` object for a given `bibleId` and `passageId`. This
Passage obje
get.description:
Gets a `Passage` object for a given `bibleId` and `passageId`. This
Passage object also includes an `content` property with all verses
corresponding to the passageId.
The `passageId` parameter can represent a chapter, verse, or range of verses (i.e. MAT.1.12-MAT.1.20).

401.description: Unauthorized for API access.  Missing or Invalid API Token provided.

403.description: Not authorized to retrieve Sections for this Bible

get.summary:
Gets search results for a given `bibleId` and query string.  Searches
will match
get.description:
Gets search results for a given `bibleId` and query string.  Searches
will match all verses with the list of keywords provided in the query string.
Order of the keywords does not matter. However all keywords must be
present in a verse for it to be considered a match.
The total number of results returned from a search can be limited by populating the `limit`
attribute in the query string with a non-negative integer value.  If no
limit value is provide a default of 10 is used.
`offset` can be used to traverse paginated results.  So for example if you are using
the default `limit` of 10, using an `offset` of 10 will return the second page of results,
namely results 11-20.
The `text` property of each verse object contains only the verse text.  It does not
contain footnote references. However, those can be queried directly using the
`/bibles/{bibleId}/verses/{verseId}` endpoint.

401.description: Unauthorized for API access.  Missing or Invalid API Token provided.

403.description: Not authorized to retrieve Sections for this Bible

parameters.name: bibleId
parameters.description: Id of Bible to search

parameters.name: query
parameters.description:
Search keywords or passage reference.  Supported wildcards are * and ?.  
The * wildcard matches any character sequence (e.g. searching for "wo*d" finds text such as "word", "world", and "worshipped").  
The ? wildcard matches any matches any single character (e.g. searching for "l?ve" finds text such as "live" and "love").

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Integer limit for how many matching results to return. Default is 10.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset for search results. Used to paginate results

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort order of results.  Supported values are `relevance` (default), `canonical` and `reverse-canonical`

parameters.name: range
parameters.description: One or more, comma seperated, passage ids (book, chapter, verse) which the search will be limited to.  (i.e. gen.1,gen.5 or gen-num or gen.1.1-gen.3.5)

parameters.name: fuzziness
parameters.description: Sets the fuzziness of a search to account for misspellings. Values can be 0, 1, 2, or AUTO. Defaults to AUTO which varies depending on the

get.summary:
Gets a single `Chapter` object for a given `audioBibleId` and `chapterId`.
This
get.description:
Gets a single `Chapter` object for a given `audioBibleId` and `chapterId`.
This AudioChapter object also includes an `resourceUrl` property with a HTTP URL
to the mp3 audio resource for the chapter.  The `resourceUrl` is unique per request
and expires in XX minutes.  The `expiresAt` property provides the Unix time value of
`resourceUrl` expiration.

401.description: Unauthorized for API access.  Missing or Invalid API Token provided.

403.description: Not authorized to retrieve Chapters for this Bible

parameters.description: Id of Bible whose Chapter to fetch

parameters.name: chapterId
parameters.description: Id of the Chapter to fetch

apiKeyHeader.name: api-key
